app.name: Vibecodr.Space
app.short_description: Guide generated apps from ChatGPT and Codex into Vibecodr.Space, where code runs on the timeline.
app.long_description: Vibecodr.Space is a social coding platform where apps are published as vibes that run directly on the timeline. Users can remix vibes like forks, like them, comment on them, and share them with a URL. This ChatGPT app is designed as a guided publish flow: connect Vibecodr once, answer only the missing launch questions, and let ChatGPT import the generated app or code bundle, validate publish readiness, compile draft capsules, attach optional thumbnail and SEO metadata, and publish directly to the user's Vibecodr account as a live, remixable vibe.

security_schemes.description: OAuth sign-in to Vibecodr account via Clerk, followed by Vibecodr CLI token exchange

safety.data_handling_summary: Uploaded file bundles are normalized and validated before mutation. Path traversal and malformed paths are rejected. Tokens are redacted from telemetry and never returned in tool outputs.
safety.abuse_controls: OAuth account linking, session-bound mutations, rate limiting, request body limits, idempotency protection, structured error tracing, and observability alerts.
